title: 3M CLAW Drywall Picture Hanger 20 kg 3PH20-4WMR 4 Hangers
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 4 x 3M CLAW drywall picture hangers, designed for mirrors, frames and heavy decorations
Hardened steel - hooks attach securely to drywall
Maximum weight tested - up to 20 kg
No tools - just press with your thumbs
NO RIVETS - Hang your decorations anywhere on a drywall.No regrets - no more big holes in the walls
description: From the manufacturer SUPPORT First, press the lower part of the hook directly into the plasterboard with thumbs. Next, press the upper part firmly into the plasterboard. CONTINUE SUPPORT IMPORTANT: Continue to press until the upper and lower parts are perfectly aligned with the wall. HOOK UP Hang the board on the hook. TO REMOVE Slide a flat-head screwdriver between the hook and the wall, then gently push it towards the outside of the plasterboard.
